pro_tip: 最后加入烤过的卡苏里葫芦巴叶，带来正宗的芳香冲击。
ingredients: 700 g Chicken Thighs | 150 g Yoghurt | 3 tsp Garam Masala | 2 tsp Cumin | 2 tsp Coriander | 1 tsp Turmeric | 2 whole Onion | 5 cloves Garlic | 30 g Ginger | 400 g Canned Tomatoes | 150 ml Double Cream | 40 g Butter
instructions: 将 yoghurt 与一半香料混合，腌制 chicken 2小时。(120 min) | 将 chicken 烤至表面焦香，静置后切块。 | 将 onion、garlic 和 ginger 用 butter 炒至金黄。(8 min) | 加入剩余香料和 tomatoes，小火炖15分钟。(15 min) | 将酱汁搅拌顺滑，放回 chicken 并加入 cream。 | 小火炖5分钟，配 naan 或米饭上桌。(5 min)

name: 黄油扁豆汤
description: 慢炖黑扁豆配黄油、奶油和温暖香料。
pro_tip: 加入干葫芦巴叶并用木炭烟熏收尾，提升整体风味层次。
ingredients: 250 g Black Lentils | 100 g Kidney Beans | 60 g Butter | 100 ml Cream | 1 whole Onion | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 3 tbsp Tomato Puree | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 1 tsp Cumin | 1 tsp Coriander | 2 whole Chilli
instructions: 将 lentils 和 beans 浸泡一夜，煮40分钟至软烂。(40 min) | 将 onion、garlic 和 ginger 用 butter 炒至金黄。(8 min) | 加入香料和 tomato puree，翻炒3分钟。(3 min) | 加入 lentils 和 beans，用极小火炖60分钟，频繁搅拌。(60 min) | 拌入 cream 和 butter，配 naan 上桌。

name: 印度鸡肉香饭
description: 芳香的层叠米饭，配慢炖鸡肉、炸洋葱和藏红花。
pro_tip: 用少许玫瑰水代替部分 ghee，带来花香收尾，并搭配富含膳食纤维的配菜沙拉。
ingredients: 400 g Basmati Rice | 800 g Chicken Thighs | 3 whole Onion | 200 g Yoghurt | 0.5 g Saffron | 4 tbsp Milk | 3 tsp Garam Masala | 2 tsp Cumin | 2 tsp Coriander | 1 tsp Turmeric | 60 g Ghee | 30 g Mint
instructions: 将 chicken 用 yoghurt 和香料腌制2小时。(120 min) | 将 onions 用 ghee 炸至深金黄色且酥脆。(20 min) | 将腌制好的 chicken 煮15分钟。(15 min) | 将 rice 预煮6分钟后沥干。(6 min) | 将 rice 和 chicken 分层叠放，顶部淋上 saffron milk，放上炸 onions 和 mint，密封锅盖。 | 用极小火焖煮30分钟。(30 min)

name: 菠菜印度奶酪咖喱
description: 奶香浓郁的菠菜咖喱配煎制的新鲜印度奶酪块。
pro_tip: 去掉 tomatoes 以保留传统绿色风味，并加少许柠檬汁中和浓郁感。
ingredients: 400 g Paneer | 800 g Spinach | 1 whole Onion | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 200 g Canned Tomatoes | 4 tbsp Double Cream | 3 tbsp Ghee | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 1 tsp Cumin | 0.5 tsp Turmeric
instructions: 将 paneer 块用 ghee 煎至金黄，盛出备用。(4 min) | 在同一锅中翻炒 onion、garlic 和 ginger。(6 min) | 加入 tomatoes 和香料，翻炒5分钟。(5 min) | 放入 spinach 炒软后粗略搅拌。 | 加入 paneer 和 cream，小火炖5分钟。(5 min)

name: 黄油鸡
description: 嫩滑鸡肉配浓郁番茄黄油奶油酱汁。
pro_tip: 最后加入冷藏 butter 乳化，打造高光泽感和更浓郁的口感。
ingredients: 700 g Chicken Breasts | 80 g Butter | 1 whole Onion | 5 cloves Garlic | 30 g Ginger | 400 g Canned Tomatoes | 150 ml Double Cream | 3 tsp Garam Masala | 2 tsp Kashmiri Chilli | 1 tsp Fenugreek Leaves | 1 tbsp Honey | 100 g Yoghurt
instructions: 将 chicken 用 yoghurt 和香料腌制1小时。(60 min) | 将 chicken 烤或煎至表面焦香。(8 min) | 将 onion、garlic 和 ginger 用 butter 炒香。(6 min) | 加入 tomatoes 和香料，炖15分钟后搅拌顺滑。(15 min) | 加入 chicken、cream、honey 和 fenugreek，小火炖5分钟。(5 min)

name: 鹰嘴豆马萨拉
description: 香料鹰嘴豆咖喱，配番茄���姜和芒果粉。
pro_tip: 用少量水分次给 onions 收汁，在不用过多油的情况下加深美拉德反应。
ingredients: 800 g Chickpeas | 2 whole Onion | 400 g Canned Tomatoes | 4 cloves Garlic | 25 g Ginger | 2 tsp Cumin Seeds | 2 tsp Coriander | 1 tsp Turmeric | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 1 tsp Amchur | 3 tbsp Oil | 20 g Coriander Leaves
instructions: 将 cumin seeds 在油中炸至爆开。(1 min) | 加入 onion、garlic 和 ginger，炒至金黄。(7 min) | 加入 tomatoes 和所有香料，翻炒8分钟。(8 min) | 加入 chickpeas 和150毫升 water，小火炖12分钟。(12 min) | 最后加入 amchur，用 coriander 装饰。

name: 克什米尔慢炖羊肉咖喱
description: 克什米尔风味慢炖羊肉，以芳香香料和酸奶为底。
pro_tip: 最后加入少许藏红花水和新鲜 coriander，呈现餐厅级摆盘效果。
ingredients: 800 g Lamb Shoulder | 2 whole Onion | 200 g Yoghurt | 3 tsp Kashmiri Chilli | 2 tsp Coriander | 2 tsp Cumin | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 4 pods Cardamom | 1 stick Cinnamon | 2 whole Bay Leaves | 60 g Ghee | 5 cloves Garlic | 30 g Ginger
instructions: 将 lamb 分批用 ghee 煎至上色。(8 min) | 翻炒 onion、garlic、ginger 和整粒香料。(6 min) | 加入研磨香料和 yoghurt，翻炒5分钟。(5 min) | 放回 lamb，加入200毫升 water，加盖焖煮55分钟。(55 min) | 配 basmati rice 和 naan 上桌。

name: 香料土豆花椰菜
description: 干炒香料土豆和花椰菜，配孜然和姜黄。
pro_tip: 将 cauliflower 和 potatoes 分别用大火煎香后再合并，确保口感和美拉德深度。
ingredients: 3 whole Potato | 1 whole Cauliflower | 1 whole Onion | 3 cloves Garlic | 15 g Ginger | 1 tsp Turmeric | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 1 tsp Coriander | 3 tbsp Oil | 15 g Coriander Leaves | 2 whole Green Chilli
instructions: 热油，放入 cumin seeds 炸至爆开。 | 加入 onion、garlic 和 ginger，翻炒5分钟。(5 min) | 加入香料、potato 和 cauliflower，充分翻炒均匀。 | 加盖，用中火煮20分钟至软熟。(20 min) | 用 coriander 和 chilli 装饰。

name: 菠菜扁豆汤
description: 黄扁豆与菠菜配芥末籽和姜调味油。
pro_tip: 用草饲 ghee 代替普通油，最后挤上新鲜青柠汁，提亮扁豆的醇厚风味。
ingredients: 250 g Yellow Lentils | 200 g Spinach | 1 whole Onion | 3 cloves Garlic | 15 g Ginger | 1 tsp Mustard Seeds | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds | 1 tsp Turmeric | 1 tsp Garam Masala | 3 tbsp Oil | 15 g Coriander Leaves | 2 whole Green Chilli
instructions: 将 lentils 加 turmeric 煮软，约20分钟。(20 min) | 热油，将 mustard 和 cumin seeds 炸至爆开。 | 加入 onion、garlic 和 ginger，翻炒5分钟。(5 min) | 加入 spinach 和 chilli，炒至变软。 | 与 lentils 混合，顶部淋上调味油并撒上 coriander。

name: 印度炸咖喱角
description: 酥脆炸酥皮，内馅为香料土豆和豌豆。
pro_tip: 在面团中加入 carom seeds，并在加入馅料前将整粒 cumin 干煸出香。
ingredients: 300 g Flour | 3 whole Potato | 100 g Peas | 2 tsp Cumin Seeds | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 1 tsp Coriander | 2 whole Green Chilli | 20 g Coriander Leaves | 400 ml Oil | 2 tbsp Ghee | 1 tsp Amchur
instructions: 将 flour、ghee 和 water 揉成硬面团，静置30分钟。(30 min) | 将 potatoes 煮熟捣碎，与 peas、香料、chilli 和 coriander 混合。 | 将面团分份，擀开切成圆片，填入馅料并封口成锥形。 | 在170°C油锅中炸至金黄，约6分钟。(6 min)

name: Paneer Tikka
description: Marinated paneer grilled with peppers and onion on skewers.
pro_tip: Add roasted besan to the marinade for a professional crust and better spice adhesion.
ingredients: 400 g Paneer | 150 g Yoghurt | 2 tsp Kashmiri Chilli | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 0.5 tsp Turmeric | 2 whole Lemon | 1 whole Red Pepper | 1 whole Green Pepper | 1 whole Onion | 2 tbsp Oil
instructions: Mix yoghurt, spices and lemon. Coat paneer and vegetables. Marinate 1 hour. (60 min) | Thread onto skewers alternating paneer and vegetables. | Grill on high heat 10-12 min turning regularly. (12 min) | Serve with green chutney and sliced onion.

name: Lamb Keema
description: Spiced minced lamb with peas and warming spices - quick and satisfying.
pro_tip: Implement a 'tadka' start by blooming whole spices in ghee, and finish with a squeeze of lime and julienned ginger for acidity.
ingredients: 600 g Ground Lamb | 150 g Peas | 1 whole Onion | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 200 g Canned Tomatoes | 3 tsp Garam Masala | 2 tsp Cumin | 1 tsp Turmeric | 1 tsp Chilli Powder | 2 tbsp Oil | 15 g Coriander Leaves
instructions: Brown lamb in hot pan, breaking up. Drain excess fat. (5 min) | Add onion, garlic and ginger. Cook 5 min. (5 min) | Add spices and tomatoes. Simmer 12 min. (12 min) | Stir in peas. Cook 5 min. (5 min) | Garnish with coriander. Serve with roti or rice.

name: Bhel Puri
description: Mumbai street food - puffed rice with chutneys, onion and coriander.
pro_tip: Fold in chilled, diced boiled potatoes and pomegranate arils for structural variety and bright acidity.
ingredients: 150 g Puffed Rice | 80 g Sev | 1 whole Onion | 2 whole Tomatoes | 20 g Coriander Leaves | 4 tbsp Tamarind Chutney | 4 tbsp Mint Chutney | 2 tsp Chaat Masala | 2 whole Lemon | 1 whole Green Chilli
instructions: Mix puffed rice, sev, diced onion, tomato and coriander. | Add both chutneys, chaat masala and lemon juice. | Toss quickly - must be served within 2 minutes or it goes soggy. | Top with more sev and chilli.

name: Chole Bhature
description: Spiced chickpeas served with deep-fried puffy bread.
pro_tip: Infuse chickpeas with tea leaves and amchur for authentic color and tang.
ingredients: 800 g Chickpeas | 2 whole Onion | 3 whole Tomatoes | 5 cloves Garlic | 25 g Ginger | 300 g Flour | 60 g Yoghurt | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 2 tsp Coriander | 1 tsp Cumin | 400 ml Oil
instructions: Make bhature dough: flour, yoghurt, salt. Knead. Rest 1 hour. (60 min) | Saute onion, garlic, ginger. Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 10 min. (10 min) | Add chickpeas and 200ml water. Simmer 15 min. (15 min) | Divide dough into 8. Roll round. | Deep fry at 180C until puffed and golden, 2 min. (2 min) | Serve hot with chole and pickled onion.

name: Malai Kofta
description: Fried paneer and potato dumplings in a rich cashew and cream gravy.
pro_tip: Double-strain the sauce for a velvet finish and add Kasuri Methi for aromatic depth.
ingredients: 250 g Paneer | 2 whole Potato | 80 g Cashews | 150 ml Cream | 2 whole Onion | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 400 g Canned Tomatoes | 3 tsp Garam Masala | 2 pods Cardamom | 400 ml Oil
instructions: Mash potato and paneer. Form into balls. Fry at 170C until golden. (5 min) | Blend cashews and cream to smooth paste. | Saute onion, garlic, ginger. Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 10 min. (10 min) | Add cashew cream. Simmer 8 min. (8 min) | Add kofta gently. Serve with rice or naan.

name: Pav Bhaji
description: Mumbai street-food mashed spiced vegetables served with buttery bread rolls.
pro_tip: Garnish with micro-coriander and pickled red onions to elevate the aesthetic and acid profile.
ingredients: 3 whole Potato | 200 g Cauliflower | 150 g Peas | 2 whole Onion | 3 whole Tomatoes | 4 cloves Garlic | 3 tbsp Pav Bhaji Masala | 80 g Butter | 8 whole Bread Rolls | 2 whole Lemon | 20 g Coriander
instructions: Boil potato, cauliflower and peas until very soft. Mash. (15 min) | Saute onion and garlic in butter until golden. (6 min) | Add tomatoes and pav bhaji masala. Cook 8 min. (8 min) | Add mashed vegetables. Mash together. Simmer 5 min. (5 min) | Toast rolls in butter. Serve bhaji topped with butter, coriander and lemon.

name: Masala Chai
description: Spiced Indian milk tea brewed with cardamom, ginger and cinnamon.
pro_tip: Halve the sugar and introduce a pinch of sea salt to brighten the cardamom.
ingredients: 500 ml Milk | 300 ml Water | 3 tbsp Black Tea | 6 pods Cardamom | 20 g Ginger | 1 stick Cinnamon | 4 whole Cloves | 4 tbsp Sugar | 0.25 tsp Black Pepper
instructions: Bruise cardamom pods. Simmer water with spices 3 min. (3 min) | Add tea. Simmer 2 min. (2 min) | Add milk and sugar. Bring to vigorous boil, then reduce. (3 min) | Simmer 3 min. Strain and serve.

name: Gulab Jamun
description: Soft milk-powder dumplings soaked in rose and cardamom syrup.
pro_tip: Garnish with 24k gold leaf and serve with a cold, unsweetened saffron rabri to cut through the intense sweetness.
ingredients: 200 g Milk Powder | 60 g Flour | 0.5 tsp Baking Powder | 20 g Ghee | 80 ml Milk | 300 g Sugar | 2 tbsp Rose Water | 4 pods Cardamom | 400 ml Oil
instructions: Make syrup: boil sugar with 400ml water, cardamom and rose water 8 min. (8 min) | Mix milk powder, flour, baking powder and ghee. Add milk to form soft dough. | Roll into 12 balls. Fry at 160C turning gently until golden brown, 6 min. (6 min) | Immediately place in warm syrup. | Soak 30 min before serving. (30 min)

name: Dosa with Sambar
description: Crispy fermented rice and lentil crepes with spiced lentil soup.
pro_tip: Incorporate fenugreek seeds into the soak to improve batter elasticity and glycemic response.
ingredients: 500 g Dosa Batter | 200 g Toor Dal | 2 tbsp Tamarind | 2 whole Tomatoes | 1 whole Onion | 1 tsp Mustard Seeds | 10 whole Curry Leaves | 1 tsp Turmeric | 2 tbsp Sambar Powder | 3 tbsp Oil | 15 g Coriander
instructions: Make the dosa batter: soak 200g parboiled rice and 50g urad dal separately for 6 hrs. Blend each smooth. Mix together, add 1 tsp salt. Ferment at room temperature overnight until bubbly. Or use store-bought dosa batter. | Cook dal until soft. Add tomatoes, tamarind and sambar powder. Simmer 15 min. (15 min) | Make tarka: pop mustard seeds in oil with curry leaves. | Pour tarka into sambar. | Heat flat pan. Pour ladle of dosa batter. Spread thin. Cook until crispy, 3 min. (3 min) | Fold. Serve with sambar and coconut chutney.

name: Tandoori Prawns
description: Smoky charred prawns in yoghurt, tandoori spice and lemon.
pro_tip: Upgrade to jumbo U-10 prawns and marinate in mustard oil for an authentic, pungent smoky finish.
ingredients: 600 g Prawns | 150 g Yoghurt | 3 tbsp Tandoori Masala | 2 whole Lemon | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 2 tbsp Oil | 1 tsp Chaat Masala | 15 g Coriander
instructions: Mix yoghurt, tandoori masala, garlic, ginger and lemon. Marinate prawns 30 min. (30 min) | Thread onto skewers. | Grill on highest heat 3 min per side until charred. (6 min) | Sprinkle chaat masala and coriander. Serve with lemon.

name: Semolina Halwa
description: Semolina halwa with cardamom, saffron and cashews.
pro_tip: Increase ghee for a professional 'sheen' and garnish with silver leaf and toasted pistachios for visual impact.
ingredients: 200 g Semolina | 80 g Ghee | 150 g Sugar | 400 ml Water | 60 g Cashews | 40 g Raisins | 6 pods Cardamom | 0.25 g Saffron | 100 ml Milk
instructions: Dissolve saffron in warm milk. | Toast cashews in ghee. Add semolina. Roast until golden, 8 min. (8 min) | Carefully add hot water - it will splutter. Stir vigorously. (1 min) | Add sugar, saffron milk and cardamom. Stir until thick. (5 min) | Fold in raisins. Rest 2 min. (2 min)

name: Cucumber Raita
description: Cooling yoghurt with cucumber, cumin and fresh herbs.
pro_tip: Finish with a drizzle of tempered mustard oil and fresh pomegranate seeds for textural contrast and visual flair.
ingredients: 400 g Greek Yoghurt | 1 whole Cucumber | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds | 15 g Mint | 10 g Coriander | 0.5 tsp Salt | 0.25 tsp Chilli Powder | 0.5 tsp Sugar
instructions: Toast cumin seeds in dry pan until fragrant. Cool. Crush. (2 min) | Grate cucumber. Squeeze out liquid. | Mix yoghurt, cucumber, cumin, mint and coriander. | Season with salt, sugar and chilli powder. | Chill 30 min before serving. (30 min)

name: Bhindi Masala
description: Stir-fried okra with onion, tomato and spices - crispy, not slimy.
pro_tip: Switch to cold-pressed mustard oil for a traditional pungent depth.
ingredients: 500 g Okra | 2 whole Onion | 2 whole Tomatoes | 3 cloves Garlic | 15 g Ginger | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds | 0.5 tsp Turmeric | 1 tsp Coriander | 1 tsp Amchur | 3 tbsp Oil | 15 g Coriander Leaves
instructions: Wash and dry okra. Cut into 2cm pieces. | Fry okra in oil without stirring until slightly crispy, 8 min. (8 min) | Add cumin, onion, garlic and ginger. Cook 5 min. (5 min) | Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 5 min. (5 min) | Top with amchur and coriander.

name: Dum Aloo
description: Baby potatoes in a tangy, spiced yoghurt and tomato gravy.
pro_tip: Introduce a 'Dhungar' smoking technique with hot charcoal and ghee to provide signature depth.
ingredients: 600 g Baby Potatoes | 150 g Yoghurt | 2 whole Onion | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 300 g Canned Tomatoes | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 1 tsp Fennel Seeds | 2 whole Chilli | 4 tbsp Oil | 15 g Coriander
instructions: Prick and fry potatoes until golden. Set aside. (8 min) | Saute onion, garlic and ginger. | Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 8 min. (8 min) | Whisk yoghurt. Add off heat. Return to low heat. | Add potatoes. Cover and simmer 15 min. (15 min) | Garnish with coriander.

name: Mutter Paneer
description: Peas and paneer in a spiced onion-tomato gravy.
pro_tip: Incorporate crushed kasuri methi at the finish for essential floral notes and a signature restaurant aroma.
ingredients: 300 g Paneer | 200 g Peas | 2 whole Onion | 3 whole Tomatoes | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 1 tsp Cumin | 0.5 tsp Turmeric | 4 tbsp Cream | 3 tbsp Oil | 15 g Coriander
instructions: Pan-fry paneer cubes until golden. Set aside. (3 min) | Saute onion, garlic and ginger until deep golden. (8 min) | Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 8 min. (8 min) | Add paneer and peas. Simmer 8 min. (8 min) | Finish with cream and coriander.

name: Seekh Kebab
description: Spiced minced chicken grilled on skewers.
pro_tip: Introduce smoked paprika or a charcoal 'dhungar' technique to replicate authentic Tandoor depth.
ingredients: 600 g Ground Chicken | 1 whole Onion | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 2 tsp Coriander | 1 tsp Cumin | 2 whole Chilli | 20 g Coriander Leaves | 1 whole Egg | 2 tbsp Oil
instructions: Blend onion, garlic, ginger and chilli. Squeeze out excess water. | Mix with chicken, spices, coriander and egg. | Wrap around flat metal skewers. Chill 30 min. (30 min) | Grill 12 min turning regularly. (12 min) | Serve with naan, raita and sliced onion.

name: Mango Lassi
description: Chilled yoghurt and mango drink with cardamom.
pro_tip: Replace sugar with honey or jaggery to elevate the fruit's natural profile.
ingredients: 400 g Greek Yoghurt | 1 whole Mango | 100 ml Cold Water | 2 tbsp Sugar | 2 pods Cardamom | 200 g Ice | 0.5 tbsp Rose Water
instructions: Grind cardamom seeds finely. | Blend yoghurt, mango, water, sugar, cardamom and ice until frothy. (2 min) | Pour into chilled glasses. | A pinch of rose water on top is optional.

name: Rice Kheer
description: Slow-cooked rice pudding with saffron, cardamom and pistachios.
pro_tip: Consider reducing the milk further for a thicker, rabri-style finish.
ingredients: 100 g Basmati Rice | 1 l Milk | 80 g Sugar | 0.25 g Saffron | 4 pods Cardamom | 40 g Pistachios | 1 tbsp Rose Water | 30 g Almonds
instructions: Soak rice 30 min. Drain. (30 min) | Bring milk to boil. Add rice. Simmer 30 min stirring frequently. (30 min) | Add sugar, saffron and cardamom. Cook 8 min. (8 min) | Stir in rose water. | Serve warm or chilled, topped with pistachios and almonds.

name: Paneer Bhurji
description: Scrambled paneer with tomatoes, onion and spices.
pro_tip: Substitute oil with ghee and finish with Kasuri Methi and lemon juice for aromatic complexity.
ingredients: 300 g Paneer | 1 whole Onion | 2 whole Tomatoes | 2 whole Green Chilli | 2 cloves Garlic | 10 g Ginger | 0.5 tsp Turmeric | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds | 1 tsp Garam Masala | 2 tbsp Oil | 15 g Coriander Leaves
instructions: Heat oil. Pop cumin seeds. | Add onion, garlic, ginger and chilli. Cook 5 min. (5 min) | Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 5 min. (5 min) | Crumble paneer in. Stir on high heat 3 min. (3 min) | Garnish with coriander. Serve with roti or toast.

name: Aloo Paratha
description: Flaky whole wheat flatbread stuffed with spiced mashed potato.
pro_tip: Add a squeeze of lemon or pomegranate powder to the filling to brighten the palate.
ingredients: 300 g Whole Wheat Flour | 3 whole Potato | 2 whole Green Chilli | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds | 1 tsp Garam Masala | 20 g Coriander Leaves | 15 g Ginger | 1 tsp Salt | 60 g Ghee | 200 g Yoghurt
instructions: Mix flour, salt and water into soft dough. Rest 20 min. (20 min) | Boil potatoes. Mash with chilli, cumin, garam masala, ginger and coriander. | Divide dough. Flatten. Fill with potato. Seal. Roll out gently. | Cook on tawa with ghee until golden spots appear, 3 min per side. (6 min) | Serve with cold yoghurt and pickle.

name: Classic Smash Burger
description: Juicy smash burger with American cheese, pickles and secret sauce.
pro_tip: Switch to a dry-aged beef blend and replace processed cheese with high-melt aged cheddar.
ingredients: 700 g Ground Beef | 4 slices American Cheese | 4 whole Burger Buns | 1 whole Onion | 60 g Pickles | 4 leaves Iceberg Lettuce | 2 whole Tomato | 3 tbsp Ketchup | 2 tbsp Mustard | 3 tbsp Mayo | 1 tsp Salt
instructions: Divide beef into 4 equal balls (about 120g each). Season generously with salt and pepper just before cooking. | Heat cast iron skillet on high 3 min until smoking. Place a beef ball, smash firmly with a spatula. Cook undisturbed 90 sec. (3 min) | Flip. Add cheese. Cook 60 sec more. (1 min) | Mix secret sauce: mayo, ketchup, mustard. | Toast buns cut-side down in the burger fat 1 min. Layer: sauce on both halves, lettuce, tomato, double smash patty, pickles and onion. (1 min)

name: Mac and Cheese
description: Baked elbow pasta in a three-cheese bechamel with golden breadcrumb crust.
pro_tip: Infuse milk with bay leaf and garlic to add aromatic complexity without additional fat.
ingredients: 350 g Elbow Pasta | 60 g Butter | 60 g Flour | 700 ml Milk | 250 g Cheddar | 100 g Gruyere | 60 g Parmesan | 80 g Panko Breadcrumbs | 1 tsp Dijon Mustard | 0.25 tsp Cayenne
instructions: Cook pasta al dente. Drain. | Make bechamel: melt butter, whisk flour, add milk, cook 5 min. (5 min) | Add mustard, cayenne and 3/4 of cheeses. Stir smooth. | Combine pasta and sauce. Pour into baking dish. | Top with remaining cheese and panko. | Bake at 190C for 20 min until golden and bubbling. (20 min)

name: New England Clam Chowder
description: Creamy potato and clam soup with smoky bacon.
pro_tip: Introduce Yukon Gold potatoes for better starch integration and finish with a dash of white pepper and Sherry vinegar to brighten the pal...
ingredients: 500 g Clams | 150 g Smoked Bacon | 3 whole Potato | 1 whole Onion | 3 stalks Celery | 40 g Butter | 40 g Flour | 200 ml Cream | 300 ml Milk | 3 sprigs Thyme | 2 whole Bay Leaves
instructions: Steam clams until open. Reserve liquor. Pick meat. (8 min) | Fry bacon until crispy. Add onion and celery. (5 min) | Stir in flour. Add clam liquor, milk and cream. Stir until thick. (5 min) | Add potato and thyme. Simmer 15 min. (15 min) | Add clam meat. Season. Serve with oyster crackers.

name: Chicken Pot Pie
description: Flaky pastry-topped pie filled with chicken, vegetables and creamy sauce. Store-bought puff pastry is standard — or make from scratch by folding butter into flour dough 6 times with resting periods between each turn.
pro_tip: Replace breast with fat-trimmed thighs and add deglazing with white wine for acidity.
ingredients: 600 g Chicken Breast | 400 g Puff Pastry | 2 whole Carrot | 150 g Peas | 3 stalks Celery | 1 whole Onion | 60 g Butter | 60 g Flour | 500 ml Chicken Broth | 100 ml Cream | 4 sprigs Thyme | 1 whole Egg
instructions: Cook and chop chicken. Saute onion, carrot and celery in butter. (8 min) | Add flour. Stir. Add broth and cream. Simmer 8 min. (8 min) | Add chicken, peas and thyme. Season. | Pour into pie dish. Cover with pastry. Crimp edges. | Brush with egg. Bake at 200C for 30 min. (30 min)

name: Buffalo Wings
description: Crispy baked chicken wings tossed in buttery hot sauce.
pro_tip: Whisk cold butter into the hot sauce off-heat to create a stable emulsion that coats wings more effectively.
ingredients: 1 kg Chicken Wings | 100 ml Hot Sauce | 60 g Butter | 2 tsp Garlic Powder | 1 tsp Onion Powder | 2 tsp Baking Powder | 1 tsp Salt | 4 stalks Celery | 150 g Blue Cheese Dip
instructions: Toss wings with baking powder, salt and garlic powder. | Bake at 220C on a rack for 40 min, flipping halfway. (40 min) | Melt butter. Mix with hot sauce. | Toss hot wings in sauce. | Serve with celery sticks and blue cheese dip.

name: Pulled Pork Sandwich
description: Smoky slow-cooked pork shoulder with homemade coleslaw on a soft bun.
pro_tip: Switch to a dry brine for 24 hours to enhance tenderness and introduce a smoke element through liquid smoke or a wood-fired oven.
ingredients: 1.5 kg Pork Shoulder | 3 tbsp Paprika | 3 tbsp Brown Sugar | 2 tsp Garlic Powder | 2 tsp Onion Powder | 1 tsp Cayenne | 200 ml BBQ Sauce | 6 whole Brioche Buns | 400 g Cabbage | 2 whole Carrot | 150 g Mayo | 3 tbsp Apple Cider Vinegar
instructions: Mix spices into rub. Coat pork generously. Refrigerate overnight. (480 min) | Cook in slow cooker on low 8 hours, or 250C oven 4 hours. (480 min) | Pull pork with forks. Toss in BBQ sauce. | Make coleslaw: toss cabbage and carrot with mayo, vinegar and salt. | Pile pork on buns with coleslaw.

name: Eggs Benedict
description: Poached eggs on English muffins with Canadian bacon and hollandaise.
pro_tip: Finish with Maldon sea salt and micro-herbs rather than standard chives to elevate the visual and textural contrast.
ingredients: 8 whole Eggs | 8 slices Canadian Bacon | 4 whole English Muffins | 4 whole Egg Yolks | 150 g Butter | 1 whole Lemon | 2 tbsp White Vinegar | 0.5 tsp Salt | 10 g Chives | 0.25 tsp Cayenne
instructions: Make hollandaise: whisk yolks over simmering water. Slowly whisk in melted butter. Add lemon and cayenne. (8 min) | Bring a wide pan of water with vinegar to a gentle simmer. | Swirl water. Drop eggs in one at a time. Poach 3 min. (3 min) | Toast muffins. Warm bacon. | Assemble: muffin, bacon, egg, hollandaise. Scatter chives.

name: Buttermilk Pancakes
description: Fluffy buttermilk pancakes with maple syrup and butter.
pro_tip: Finish with a pinch of fleur de sel on top to contrast the maple syrup's sweetness.
ingredients: 300 g Flour | 2 tsp Baking Powder | 0.5 tsp Baking Soda | 3 tbsp Sugar | 0.5 tsp Salt | 360 ml Buttermilk | 2 whole Eggs | 60 g Butter | 1 tsp Vanilla | 80 ml Maple Syrup
instructions: Whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda and salt. In a separate bowl beat buttermilk, eggs, melted butter and vanilla. | Fold wet into dry - lumpy is fine. | Heat griddle to medium (about 175°C). Butter lightly. Pour ¼-cup ladlefuls. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2 min. (2 min) | Flip. Cook 1 min more until golden on second side. Keep warm in oven at 90°C while cooking remaining batches — usually 4–5 batches total. (1 min) | Stack and serve immediately with maple syrup and cold butter.

name: Caesar Salad
description: Crispy romaine, parmesan and garlicky caesar dressing with croutons.
pro_tip: Rub the salad bowl with a cut garlic clove for aromatic depth and use only the hearts of romaine for maximum crunch.
ingredients: 2 heads Romaine Lettuce | 80 g Parmesan | 200 g Sourdough Bread | 2 whole Egg Yolks | 2 cloves Garlic | 4 whole Anchovy Fillets | 1 tsp Dijon Mustard | 2 whole Lemon | 1 tsp Worcestershire Sauce | 120 ml Olive Oil | 1 tsp Black Pepper
instructions: Tear bread into cubes. Toss with oil and garlic. Bake at 190C for 12 min. (12 min) | Blend egg yolks, anchovies, garlic, mustard, lemon and Worcestershire. | Slowly whisk in olive oil to emulsify. Season generously. | Tear lettuce. Toss with dressing and Parmesan. | Top with croutons and extra Parmesan.

name: Chili Con Carne
description: Smoky beef chili with kidney beans, chipotle and dark beer.
pro_tip: Finish with a splash of apple cider vinegar to brighten the heavy fats and balance the smokiness.
ingredients: 800 g Ground Beef | 400 g Kidney Beans | 800 g Canned Tomatoes | 2 whole Onion | 5 cloves Garlic | 2 tbsp Chipotle in Adobo | 330 ml Dark Beer | 3 tsp Cumin | 2 tsp Paprika | 2 tsp Chilli Powder | 30 g Dark Chocolate | 150 g Sour Cream
instructions: Brown beef, drain excess fat. | Saute onion and garlic. Add spices. Cook 3 min. (3 min) | Add beef, tomatoes, chipotle and beer. Bring to boil. (3 min) | Simmer 45 min. Add beans. Cook 10 more min. (55 min) | Stir in chocolate. Season. | Serve with sour cream, cheddar and cornbread.

name: Lobster Roll
description: New England chilled lobster salad in a buttered split-top roll.
pro_tip: Transition to a lemon-butter emulsion for a more refined profile and use high-quality brioche for the rolls.
ingredients: 600 g Lobster Tails | 80 g Mayo | 2 stalks Celery | 15 g Chives | 2 whole Lemon | 4 whole Split-Top Rolls | 40 g Butter | 0.5 tsp Salt | 0.25 tsp White Pepper
instructions: Steam or boil lobster tails 6 min. Cool. (6 min) | Remove meat. Chop into chunks. | Mix with mayo, diced celery, chives, lemon, salt and pepper. | Butter and grill rolls in a pan until golden. (3 min) | Fill with lobster salad. Serve with lemon and chips.

name: French Dip Sandwich
description: Thin-sliced roast beef in a toasted hoagie dipped in rich au jus.
pro_tip: Deglaze onions with sherry and upgrade to a 48-hour fortified veal stock.
ingredients: 500 g Roast Beef | 600 ml Beef Broth | 4 whole Hoagie Rolls | 8 slices Provolone | 1 whole Onion | 30 g Butter | 2 cloves Garlic | 3 sprigs Thyme | 1 tbsp Worcestershire Sauce
instructions: (For the roast beef: season a 500g sirloin with salt and pepper, roast at 200°C for 25 min for medium-rare, rest 20 min, then slice thin. Or use quality deli roast beef.) Saute onion in butter until caramelised, 15 min. (15 min) | Simmer broth with garlic, thyme and Worcestershire 10 min. (10 min) | Warm roast beef in the broth briefly. | Toast rolls. Layer beef, onion and provolone. | Serve with individual bowls of au jus for dipping.

name: Buttermilk Fried Chicken
description: Deeply flavored crispy fried chicken - brined overnight in buttermilk.
pro_tip: Finish with a drizzle of honey-butter or a dusting of celery salt to elevate the flavor profile.
ingredients: 1.2 kg Chicken Pieces | 500 ml Buttermilk | 300 g Flour | 3 tsp Paprika | 2 tsp Garlic Powder | 2 tsp Onion Powder | 1 tsp Cayenne | 2 tsp Salt | 2 tsp Black Pepper | 1 l Oil
instructions: Soak chicken in buttermilk with salt overnight. (480 min) | Mix flour with paprika, garlic powder, onion, cayenne, salt and pepper. | Dredge chicken in flour. Rest 15 min. Dredge again. (15 min) | Fry at 165C until golden and cooked through, 12-15 min. (14 min) | Drain on wire rack. Season immediately.

name: Blueberry Muffins
description: Bakery-style tall muffins bursting with fresh blueberries.
pro_tip: Finish with a lemon-thyme streusel or pearl sugar to provide the textural contrast expected in fine dining.
ingredients: 350 g Flour | 200 g Sugar | 2 tsp Baking Powder | 0.5 tsp Salt | 2 whole Eggs | 200 ml Milk | 120 ml Oil | 2 tsp Vanilla | 300 g Blueberries | 2 tsp Lemon Zest
instructions: Mix dry ingredients: flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, lemon zest. | Whisk eggs, milk, oil and vanilla. | Fold wet into dry until just combined. Fold in blueberries. | Fill muffin cups 3/4 full. | Bake at 200C for 22 min. (22 min)

name: Philly Cheesesteak
description: Thin ribeye, caramelised onion and Provolone on a toasted hoagie.
pro_tip: Swap butter for beef tallow to enhance the flavor profile and withstand higher searing temperatures.
ingredients: 600 g Beef Ribeye | 2 whole Onion | 200 g Provolone | 4 whole Hoagie Rolls | 30 g Butter | 1 tsp Salt | 1 tsp Pepper | 2 tsp Worcestershire Sauce | 1 whole Green Pepper
instructions: Freeze steak 30 min. Slice paper thin. (30 min) | Caramelise onions in butter 12 min. (12 min) | Cook beef on screaming hot griddle 3 min. (3 min) | Add onions and pepper. Lay cheese over. Let melt. (1 min) | Scoop into split, toasted hoagie rolls.

name: Banana Bread
description: Dense, moist banana bread with walnuts and dark brown sugar.
pro_tip: Subsitute 50g of butter with brown butter for a deep, nutty aroma and add a tablespoon of dark rum to enhance the vanilla.
ingredients: 3 whole Bananas | 240 g Flour | 100 g Butter | 150 g Brown Sugar | 2 whole Eggs | 1 tsp Baking Soda | 0.5 tsp Salt | 1 tsp Vanilla | 80 g Walnuts | 1 tsp Cinnamon
instructions: Mash bananas well. | Beat softened butter and sugar together until pale and fluffy. Beat in eggs one at a time, then vanilla. | Stir in bananas. | Fold in flour, baking soda, salt and cinnamon. | Fold in walnuts. Pour into loaf tin. | Bake at 175C for 55-60 min. (58 min)

name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
description: Classic brown-butter chocolate chip cookies - crispy edge, chewy center.
pro_tip: Finish with flakey sea salt to balance the sweetness and enhance the chocolate profile.
ingredients: 280 g Flour | 220 g Butter | 200 g Brown Sugar | 100 g White Sugar | 2 whole Eggs | 2 tsp Vanilla | 1 tsp Baking Soda | 1 tsp Salt | 300 g Chocolate Chips
instructions: Brown butter until nutty. Cool 20 min. (20 min) | Beat butter and sugars until combined. Add eggs and vanilla. | Fold in flour, baking soda and salt. | Stir in chocolate chips. | Chill dough 30 min. (30 min) | Scoop onto tray. Bake at 190C for 11-12 min. (12 min)

name: Key Lime Pie
description: Tangy, creamy Key lime filling in a graham cracker crust.
pro_tip: Add a pinch of sea salt to the crust to balance the sugar and use mascarpone-stabilized cream for a more luxurious mouthfeel.
ingredients: 200 g Graham Crackers | 80 g Butter | 3 tbsp Sugar | 4 whole Egg Yolks | 120 ml Key Lime Juice | 400 g Condensed Milk | 2 tbsp Lime Zest | 200 ml Cream
instructions: Crush crackers with butter and sugar. Press into tart tin. Bake 10 min. (10 min) | Beat egg yolks until pale. Mix in condensed milk, lime juice and zest. | Pour into crust. Bake at 175C for 15 min. (15 min) | Cool, then refrigerate 2 hours. (120 min) | Whip cream. Top pie before serving.

name: Southern Cornbread
description: Slightly sweet, crumbly Southern cornbread baked in a cast iron skillet.
pro_tip: Substitute standard butter with beurre noisette for deeper complexity and fold in whipped egg whites for a lighter, Michelin-standard tex...
ingredients: 200 g Cornmeal | 100 g Flour | 3 tbsp Sugar | 2 tsp Baking Powder | 1 tsp Salt | 2 whole Eggs | 300 ml Buttermilk | 80 g Butter
instructions: Preheat cast iron skillet at 200C for 10 min. (10 min) | Melt butter in the hot skillet. | Mix dry ingredients. Whisk in eggs, buttermilk and most of the butter. | Pour into hot skillet. | Bake at 200C for 22 min until golden and pulling from edges. (22 min)

name: Beef Chili Dog
description: All-beef hot dogs topped with chili, cheddar and diced onion.
pro_tip: Deglaze the chili with a dark ale or stout to add malty depth and sophisticated bitterness.
ingredients: 8 whole Hot Dogs | 8 whole Hot Dog Buns | 300 g Ground Beef | 400 g Canned Tomatoes | 200 g Kidney Beans | 2 whole Onion | 2 tsp Cumin | 2 tsp Chilli Powder | 100 g Cheddar | 2 tbsp Yellow Mustard
instructions: Brown beef with half the onion. Add cumin and chilli powder. (4 min) | Add tomatoes and beans. Simmer 15 min. (15 min) | Grill or boil hot dogs. | Toast buns. | Layer: hot dog, chili, raw onion, cheddar and mustard.

name: Chicken Caesar Wrap
description: Grilled chicken, crisp romaine and Parmesan in a warm flour tortilla.
pro_tip: Subsitute commercial tortillas with spinach-infused wraps for micronutrients and use Greek yogurt to cut the dressing's fat while maintai...
ingredients: 500 g Chicken Breasts | 1 head Romaine Lettuce | 60 g Parmesan | 4 whole Flour Tortillas | 100 ml Caesar Dressing | 60 g Croutons | 1 whole Lemon | 1 tsp Black Pepper
instructions: (Store-bought flour tortillas are standard. To make from scratch: mix 240g flour, ½ tsp salt, 1 tsp baking powder, 2 tbsp lard, 140ml warm water; knead, rest 30 min, roll thin and cook on a dry griddle 1 min per side.)  Season chicken. Grill 4 min per side until cooked. (8 min) | Rest and slice. | Toss romaine with dressing, Parmesan and croutons. | Warm tortillas. | Fill each with chicken and salad. Wrap and serve.

name: New York Cheesecake
description: Dense, creamy baked cheesecake with graham cracker base and sour cream top.
pro_tip: Sieve the final batter through a chinois for a perfectly silken, void-free texture.
ingredients: 900 g Cream Cheese | 250 g Sugar | 5 whole Eggs | 200 g Sour Cream | 2 tsp Vanilla | 1 tbsp Lemon Zest | 200 g Graham Crackers | 80 g Butter
instructions: Crush crackers with butter. Press into springform tin. Bake 8 min. (8 min) | Beat cream cheese and sugar until smooth. Add eggs one at a time. | Mix in sour cream, vanilla and lemon zest. | Pour into tin. Bake in water bath at 160C for 55 min. (55 min) | Cool in oven 1 hour. Refrigerate overnight. (60 min)

name: Loaded Baked Potato
description: Baked potato loaded with sour cream, cheddar, bacon and chives.
pro_tip: Finish with micro-chives and a pinch of Maldon to heighten visual and tactile contrast.
ingredients: 4 whole Russet Potatoes | 150 g Sour Cream | 120 g Cheddar | 100 g Smoked Bacon | 20 g Chives | 40 g Butter | 1 tsp Salt | 0.5 tsp Black Pepper
instructions: Scrub potatoes. Pierce all over. Rub with oil and salt. | Bake at 220C for 55-60 min until skin is crisp. (58 min) | Fry bacon until crispy. Crumble. | Split potatoes. Fluff with fork. | Load with butter, sour cream, cheddar, bacon and chives.

name: Devilled Eggs
description: Classic party appetiser - hard-boiled eggs filled with creamy yolk and paprika.
pro_tip: Add a high-end textural element like crispy pancetta or micro-celery to elevate the dish from picnic fare to a restaurant-grade appetizer.
ingredients: 12 whole Eggs | 80 g Mayo | 2 tsp Dijon Mustard | 1 tsp White Vinegar | 0.5 tsp Salt | 1 tsp Paprika | 15 g Chives | 1 tsp Hot Sauce
instructions: Hard boil eggs 10 min. Cool in ice water. (10 min) | Peel and halve lengthwise. | Mix yolks with mayo, mustard, vinegar, salt and hot sauce until smooth. | Pipe or spoon filling back into whites. | Dust with paprika. Garnish with chives.

name: New England Clam Bake
description: New England clam bake with lobster, corn, potatoes and chorizo.
pro_tip: Finish with a cold-emulsified lemon-herb beurre blanc instead of plain butter to elevate the flavor profile to five-star standards.
ingredients: 1 kg Clams | 1 kg Lobster | 3 whole Corn | 600 g Potatoes | 300 g Chorizo | 2 whole Onion | 6 cloves Garlic | 100 g Butter | 250 ml White Wine | 3 tbsp Old Bay Seasoning | 30 g Parsley
instructions: Layer potatoes, chorizo, corn and onion in a large pot with white wine. | Add Old Bay and garlic. Bring to boil. (3 min) | Add lobster and clams. Cover tightly. | Steam 20 min until clams open and lobster is red. (20 min) | Pour into large serving tray. Drizzle melted butter and parsley.

name: Sweet Potato Pie
description: Smooth, warmly spiced sweet potato filling in a butter crust.
pro_tip: Blind bake the pastry at 190C before filling to ensure crispness.
ingredients: 700 g Sweet Potato | 250 g Flour | 180 g Butter | 120 g Sugar | 80 g Brown Sugar | 3 whole Eggs | 150 ml Evaporated Milk | 2 tsp Cinnamon | 0.5 tsp Nutmeg | 1 tsp Vanilla | 0.5 tsp Salt
instructions: Make pastry: rub butter into flour. Add 4 tbsp ice water. Rest 30 min. (30 min) | Bake sweet potatoes at 200C until soft, 45 min. (45 min) | Scoop flesh. Blend with sugars, eggs, milk, spices and vanilla until smooth. | Line pie dish with pastry. Fill. | Bake at 180C for 45 min. (45 min)

name: Reuben Sandwich
description: Corned beef, sauerkraut and Swiss on toasted rye with Russian dressing.
pro_tip: Use a weighted press to achieve a perfectly uniform, shatter-crisp Maillard reaction on the crust.
ingredients: 200 g Corned Beef | 100 g Sauerkraut | 4 slices Swiss Cheese | 4 slices Rye Bread | 60 ml Russian Dressing | 30 g Butter
instructions: Spread Russian dressing on bread slices. | Layer corned beef, sauerkraut and Swiss cheese. | Butter outsides of sandwich. | Grill in pan or press in panini press 4 min per side. (8 min)

name: Biscuits and Gravy
description: Fluffy Southern biscuits topped with creamy sausage gravy.
pro_tip: Grate frozen butter into the flour for maximum lift and incorporate toasted fennel seeds into the sausage.
ingredients: 300 g Flour | 2 tsp Baking Powder | 80 g Butter | 200 ml Buttermilk | 400 g Pork Sausage | 400 ml Milk | 2 tsp Black Pepper | 1 tsp Salt
instructions: Make biscuits: rub butter into flour and baking powder. Add buttermilk. Pat 2cm thick. Cut rounds. | Bake at 220C for 14 min. (14 min) | Brown sausage, breaking into pieces. (5 min) | Sprinkle flour over sausage. Whisk in milk slowly. Simmer 5 min. (5 min) | Season generously with black pepper. Split biscuits. Smother with gravy.

name: Cobb Salad
description: Classic American salad with chicken, bacon, egg, avocado and blue cheese.
pro_tip: Emulsify the dressing more aggressively with an immersion blender for a professional, clinging consistency-clinging finish.
ingredients: 400 g Chicken Breast | 100 g Smoked Bacon | 4 whole Eggs | 2 whole Avocado | 1 head Romaine Lettuce | 200 g Cherry Tomatoes | 80 g Blue Cheese | 3 tbsp Red Wine Vinegar | 60 ml Olive Oil | 1 tsp Dijon Mustard | 15 g Chives
instructions: Grill chicken. Cool and dice. (10 min) | Fry bacon until crispy. Hard boil eggs. (10 min) | Make dressing: whisk olive oil, vinegar and mustard. | Arrange lettuce in bowl. Row each topping across: chicken, bacon, halved eggs, avocado, tomatoes and blue cheese. | Drizzle dressing. Scatter chives.

name: Linguine with Clams
description: Linguine with clams, white wine, garlic and parsley.
pro_tip: Introduce toasted breadcrumbs or Bottarga for textural contrast and an umami boost typical of Michelin-level plating.
ingredients: 350 g Linguine | 800 g Clams | 5 cloves Garlic | 200 ml White Wine | 80 ml Olive Oil | 1 tsp Chilli Flakes | 30 g Parsley | 2 whole Lemon | 40 g Butter
instructions: Scrub clams. Discard any open ones. | Cook linguine al dente. Reserve 200ml pasta water. | Saute garlic and chilli in olive oil. (2 min) | Add white wine and clams. Cover and steam 5 min until all open. (5 min) | Add pasta and pasta water. Toss with butter. | Finish with parsley and lemon.

name: Texas Brisket
description: Slow-smoked whole packer brisket with bark and smoke ring.
pro_tip: Swap wood chips for seasoned oak splits to achieve a cleaner, thinner blue smoke.
ingredients: 5 kg Beef Brisket | 80 g Coarse Salt | 60 g Black Pepper | 2 tbsp Garlic Powder | 2 tbsp Onion Powder | 500 g Oak Wood Chips
instructions: Trim brisket to 1cm fat cap. Combine salt, pepper, garlic and onion powder. | Coat brisket generously. Rest 1 hour at room temp. (60 min) | Smoke at 110C fat side down for 8 hours, adding wood chips every hour. (480 min) | Wrap in butcher paper at 74C internal. Continue until 96C internal, about 2-3 more hours. (150 min) | Rest wrapped in cooler 1-2 hours. (90 min) | Slice point against grain. Slice flat against grain. Serve with pickles and onion.

name: St Louis Ribs
description: Slow-smoked pork ribs with dry rub and finishing BBQ glaze.
pro_tip: Subsitute 50% of the sugar with kosher salt and finish with a spray of apple cider vinegar and bourbon for refined acidity.
ingredients: 2 racks Pork St Louis Ribs | 60 g Brown Sugar | 3 tbsp Paprika | 2 tbsp Garlic Powder | 2 tbsp Onion Powder | 2 tbsp Black Pepper | 1 tbsp Cumin | 1 tsp Cayenne | 250 ml BBQ Sauce | 200 ml Apple Juice
instructions: Remove membrane from ribs. Mix dry rub ingredients. Apply all over. | Smoke at 120C for 3 hours. (180 min) | Wrap in foil with apple juice. Cook 1 more hour. (60 min) | Unwrap. Glaze with BBQ sauce. Cook 30 min until sticky. (30 min) | Rest 10 min. Slice between bones.

name: Smoked Chicken
description: Whole chicken rubbed with garlic butter and smoked until juicy.
pro_tip: Pull the bird at 68C to allow carryover heat to finish the cook without drying the fibers.
ingredients: 2 kg Whole Chicken | 80 g Butter | 6 cloves Garlic | 2 tbsp Paprika | 2 tsp Salt | 2 tsp Black Pepper | 4 sprigs Thyme | 2 whole Lemon | 200 g Apple Wood Chips
instructions: Mix softened butter with garlic, paprika, salt and thyme. | Loosen skin. Push butter under skin and over outside. | Stuff cavity with lemon halves. | Smoke at 120C for 3 hours until breast reads 74C. (180 min) | Rest 15 min. Carve.

name: Memphis Pulled Pork
description: Pulled pork shoulder with Memphis-style dry rub and vinegar slaw.
pro_tip: Always rest the meat for at least one hour to ensure peak succulence and fat integration.
ingredients: 2 kg Pork Shoulder | 60 g Brown Sugar | 4 tbsp Paprika | 2 tbsp Mustard Powder | 2 tbsp Garlic Powder | 1 tsp Cayenne | 2 tbsp Salt | 2 tbsp Black Pepper | 200 ml Apple Cider Vinegar | 8 whole Burger Buns
instructions: Combine all dry rub ingredients. Rub all over pork shoulder generously. | Refrigerate overnight. (480 min) | Smoke at 115C for 6 hours. (360 min) | Spritz with apple cider vinegar every hour. | Pull at 93C internal. Shred. | Serve on buns with vinegar slaw.

name: Smoked Salmon
description: Dry-brined salmon hot smoked with alder wood until flaky and rich.
pro_tip: Reduce sugar by 30% and pull the fish at 52C for a sophisticated, translucent flake.
ingredients: 1 kg Salmon Side | 80 g Brown Sugar | 40 g Salt | 2 tsp Black Pepper | 2 tsp Garlic Powder | 2 tsp Lemon Zest | 150 g Alder Wood Chips | 20 g Dill | 100 g Cream Cheese
instructions: Mix brine: brown sugar, salt, pepper, garlic and lemon zest. | Coat salmon. Refrigerate 4 hours. (240 min) | Rinse brine. Pat dry. Air-dry 30 min until tacky pellicle forms. (30 min) | Smoke at 80C for 2-3 hours until internal temp is 62C. (150 min) | Cool completely. Flake over salads or pasta, or serve with cream cheese, capers and crackers.

name: BBQ Corn on the Cob
description: Charred corn with smoked chilli butter and lime.
pro_tip: Upgrade to brown butter and finish with smoked Maldon salt for a sophisticated flavor profile.
ingredients: 4 whole Corn | 80 g Butter | 2 tsp Smoked Paprika | 1 tsp Chilli Powder | 1 tsp Garlic Powder | 2 whole Lime | 1 tsp Salt | 15 g Chives
instructions: Mix softened butter with paprika, chilli, garlic and salt. | Husk corn. Grill directly on BBQ, turning, 12-15 min. (14 min) | Spread butter over hot corn. | Squeeze lime. Garnish with chives.

name: Carolina Vinegar Sauce
description: Eastern Carolina-style thin tangy vinegar BBQ sauce.
pro_tip: Incorporate a dash of dry mustard for emulsification and a splash of Worcestershire to provide a sophisticated savory backbone.
ingredients: 400 ml Apple Cider Vinegar | 150 ml White Vinegar | 3 tbsp Brown Sugar | 1 tsp Salt | 1 tsp Cayenne | 2 tsp Red Pepper Flakes | 2 tsp Black Pepper
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a saucepan. | Simmer 5 min until sugar dissolves. (5 min) | Cool completely before using. | Excellent on pulled pork - drizzle over meat not bun.

name: Smoke-Roasted Beets
description: Whole beets slow-roasted in the smoker with balsamic and thyme.
pro_tip: Discard the foil for the final thirty minutes to develop a lacquered, smoky exterior.
ingredients: 800 g Beetroot | 3 tbsp Olive Oil | 3 tbsp Balsamic Vinegar | 4 sprigs Thyme | 4 cloves Garlic | 1 tsp Salt | 1 tsp Black Pepper | 1 tbsp Orange Zest
instructions: Toss beets with oil, balsamic, thyme, garlic, salt and pepper. | Wrap in foil parcels. | Place in smoker at 135C for 90 min until tender. (90 min) | Unwrap. Dress with orange zest. | Serve warm or at room temp.

name: BBQ Baked Beans
description: Slow-baked navy beans with smoked paprika, molasses and chipotle.
pro_tip: Reduce brown sugar and add a splash of dark espresso for a more complex, bitter-sweet profile.
ingredients: 500 g Navy Beans | 150 g Smoked Bacon | 1 whole Onion | 4 cloves Garlic | 4 tbsp Tomato Puree | 3 tbsp Molasses | 3 tbsp Brown Sugar | 2 tbsp Chipotle in Adobo | 2 tsp Smoked Paprika | 2 tbsp Mustard | 2 tbsp Apple Cider Vinegar
instructions: Soak beans overnight. Boil 40 min until just tender. (40 min) | Fry bacon and onion. Add garlic and all remaining ingredients plus 300ml bean cooking water. | Combine with beans in Dutch oven. | Bake covered at 160C for 1 hour. (60 min) | Uncover. Bake 20 more min to thicken. (20 min)

name: Beef Burnt Ends
description: Smoked brisket point cubes sauced and returned to the smoker until sticky.
pro_tip: Rest the whole point for 45 minutes before cubing to ensure maximum cellular hydration.
ingredients: 2 kg Brisket Point | 80 g BBQ Rub | 200 ml BBQ Sauce | 60 g Brown Sugar | 60 g Butter | 100 ml Apple Juice
instructions: Rub brisket point generously. Smoke at 110C until 76C internal, about 5 hours. (300 min) | Cube into 4cm pieces. | Toss cubes with BBQ sauce, brown sugar, butter and apple juice. | Place back in smoker at 135C in a foil tray for 1 hour. (60 min) | Sauce will reduce and sticky bark will form. Serve hot.

name: Kansas City Ribs
description: Baby back ribs with Kansas City-style sweet, thick BBQ glaze.
pro_tip: Reduce the brown sugar in the rub and add acidity through a spritz during the cook.
ingredients: 2 racks Baby Back Ribs | 80 g Brown Sugar | 3 tbsp Paprika | 2 tbsp Salt | 2 tbsp Garlic Powder | 1 tbsp Onion Powder | 0.5 tsp Cayenne | 200 ml Tomato Ketchup | 3 tbsp Molasses | 3 tbsp Apple Cider Vinegar | 2 tbsp Worcestershire Sauce
instructions: Remove membrane. Apply dry rub all over. Rest 1 hour. (60 min) | Make Kansas City sauce: simmer ketchup, molasses, vinegar, Worcestershire, remaining brown sugar and spices 10 min. (10 min) | Smoke ribs at 120C for 3 hours. (180 min) | Glaze with sauce. Smoke 30 more min. (30 min) | Rest 10 min. Slice.

name: Whole Smoked Turkey
description: Dry-brined whole turkey smoked with pecan wood.
pro_tip: Inject the breast with herb-infused clarified butter to guarantee moisture during the long smoke.
ingredients: 5 kg Whole Turkey | 100 g Kosher Salt | 60 g Brown Sugar | 3 tbsp Paprika | 2 tbsp Garlic Powder | 2 tbsp Onion Powder | 2 tbsp Black Pepper | 100 g Butter | 4 sprigs Herbs | 300 g Pecan Wood Chips
instructions: Mix salt, sugar and spices. Rub all over turkey including under skin. Refrigerate 24 hours. (1440 min) | Remove from fridge 1 hour before cooking. (60 min) | Smoke at 135C for 4 hours, adding wood every hour. (240 min) | Internal breast temp should reach 74C. | Rest 30 min under foil. Carve. (30 min)

name: BBQ Cauliflower Steaks
description: Thick cauliflower steaks grilled with smoky chipotle and lime marinade.
pro_tip: Add a splash of maple syrup for better caramelization and serve with a tahini-based crema for satiety.
ingredients: 2 whole Cauliflower | 2 tbsp Chipotle in Adobo | 4 tbsp Olive Oil | 2 whole Lime | 2 tsp Smoked Paprika | 2 tsp Garlic Powder | 1 tsp Salt | 20 g Coriander | 60 g Pomegranate Seeds
instructions: Slice cauliflower into 3cm steaks from the center. | Mix chipotle, oil, lime, paprika, garlic and salt. | Coat steaks in marinade. Rest 30 min. (30 min) | Grill on high heat 6-7 min per side until charred and tender. (13 min) | Top with coriander and pomegranate seeds.

name: Smoked Pork Belly
description: Smoked pork belly with crispy bark served sliced with pickles.
pro_tip: Introduce toasted star anise to the rub and use a mustard binder for superior bark adhesion.
ingredients: 1.2 kg Pork Belly | 60 g Brown Sugar | 2 tbsp Salt | 2 tbsp Black Pepper | 2 tbsp Paprika | 1 tbsp Garlic Powder | 1 tsp Cayenne | 200 g Apple Wood Chips | 100 ml Apple Cider Vinegar
instructions: Score skin. Rub all surfaces with dry rub. Refrigerate overnight. (480 min) | Smoke skin-side up at 120C for 3 hours, spritzing with vinegar hourly. (180 min) | Rest 15 min. Slice 1cm thick. (15 min) | Serve with pickled vegetables and soft rolls.

name: Chipotle BBQ Sauce
description: Smoky chipotle BBQ sauce with molasses and apple cider vinegar.
pro_tip: Cut the brown sugar by half to balance the glycemic impact and highlight the smoke.
ingredients: 3 tbsp Chipotle in Adobo | 300 ml Tomato Ketchup | 4 tbsp Molasses | 4 tbsp Brown Sugar | 4 tbsp Apple Cider Vinegar | 2 tbsp Worcestershire Sauce | 2 tsp Garlic Powder | 2 tsp Smoked Paprika | 1 tsp Onion Powder
instructions: Blend chipotle smooth. | Combine all ingredients in saucepan. | Simmer 15 min until sauce thickens slightly. (15 min) | Taste and adjust sweetness, acid and heat. | Cool. Store refrigerated up to 2 weeks.

name: Grilled Lobster
description: Lobster tails split and grilled with garlic herb butter.
pro_tip: Shorten cooking time to 6 minutes for optimal succulence and add a splash of dry vermouth to the butter for depth.
ingredients: 4 whole Lobster Tails | 150 g Butter | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Parsley | 2 whole Lemon | 1 tsp Paprika | 1 tsp Salt | 0.5 tsp White Pepper
instructions: Split tails lengthwise. Pull meat up over shell. | Mix softened butter with garlic, parsley, paprika, salt and pepper. | Spread butter on exposed meat. | Grill cut-side up on medium-high heat 8-10 min until opaque and lightly charred. (10 min) | Squeeze lemon. Serve with remaining butter.

name: Hickory Smoked Sausage
description: Whole hickory-smoked sausage links served with mustard and pickled onion.
pro_tip: Maintain skin integrity by finishing at 145C and using a water pan for moisture.
ingredients: 800 g Sausage Links | 4 tbsp Yellow Mustard | 100 g Pickled Red Onion | 100 g Hickory Wood Chips | 4 whole Bread Rolls
instructions: Cold-smoke sausages at 80C with hickory for 45 min. (45 min) | Raise to 160C and cook 15 more min until skins split slightly. (15 min) | Make quick pickled onion: slice onion, cover with vinegar and sugar 20 min. | Serve sausages split in rolls with yellow mustard and pickled onion.

name: Smoked Mac and Cheese
description: Creamy four-cheese macaroni smoked in a cast iron skillet.
pro_tip: Infuse the milk with shallots and peppercorns for a more sophisticated aromatic base.
ingredients: 350 g Elbow Pasta | 200 g Cheddar | 100 g Gruyere | 100 g Cream Cheese | 60 g Parmesan | 60 g Butter | 60 g Flour | 600 ml Milk | 60 g Panko | 2 tsp Smoked Paprika
instructions: Cook pasta al dente. Drain. | Make bechamel. Add cheeses until smooth. | Combine pasta and sauce. Pour into cast iron skillet. | Top with panko and paprika. | Place in smoker at 135C for 45 min until golden and smoky. (45 min)

name: Jamaican Jerk Chicken
description: Scotch bonnet-marinated chicken grilled over allspice wood.
pro_tip: Use pimento wood chips to achieve authentic smokiness and replace soy with coconut aminos to reduce sodium.
ingredients: 1.2 kg Chicken Pieces | 3 whole Scotch Bonnet | 6 cloves Garlic | 30 g Ginger | 6 whole Spring Onion | 2 tbsp Allspice | 1 tsp Cinnamon | 0.5 tsp Nutmeg | 6 sprigs Thyme | 3 tbsp Soy Sauce | 2 tbsp Brown Sugar | 3 whole Lime
instructions: Blend all marinade ingredients until smooth. | Score chicken deeply. Coat in jerk marinade. Marinate overnight. (480 min) | Grill on medium heat turning and basting, 40-45 min until cooked through. (43 min) | Rest 5 min. (5 min) | Serve with rice and peas and festival dumplings.

name: Alabama White Sauce
description: Alabama-style white BBQ sauce - creamy, tangy, peppery.
pro_tip: Use coarse-ground smoked black pepper to reinforce the barbecue's wood-fired character.
ingredients: 250 g Mayo | 80 ml Apple Cider Vinegar | 2 tbsp Horseradish | 1 tbsp Dijon Mustard | 2 tsp Black Pepper | 1 tsp Garlic Powder | 1 tsp Sugar | 0.5 tsp Salt | 2 tbsp Lemon Juice
instructions: Whisk all ingredients together. | Taste and adjust seasoning. | Refrigerate at least 1 hour before serving. (60 min) | Excellent as dipping sauce for smoked chicken or drizzled over pulled pork.

name: Smoked Brisket Tacos
description: Leftover smoked brisket in warm tortillas with salsa and pickled jalapeños.
pro_tip: Swap sour cream for a fermented lime-radish crema to elevate the acidity.
ingredients: 400 g Smoked Brisket | 12 whole Corn Tortillas | 60 g Pickled Jalapeños | 20 g Coriander | 1 whole Onion | 150 ml Salsa Verde | 2 whole Lime | 2 whole Avocado | 100 g Sour Cream
instructions: (For the smoked brisket: see the full Smoked Brisket recipe in the BBQ catalog — smoke a full brisket flat at 120°C for 10–12 hrs. These tacos are the perfect use for leftovers.) Warm brisket in foil with a splash of beef broth. (5 min) | Warm tortillas directly on flame. | Slice or chop brisket. | Top tortillas with brisket, diced onion and jalapeños. | Add salsa, coriander, avocado and sour cream. Squeeze lime.

name: Peach BBQ Glazed Ham
description: Whole smoked ham glazed with peach preserves and brown sugar.
pro_tip: Finish with a high-heat sear to create a shatteringly crisp exterior while maintaining a succulent interior.
ingredients: 3 kg Smoked Ham | 200 g Peach Preserves | 80 g Brown Sugar | 3 tbsp Dijon Mustard | 3 tbsp Apple Cider Vinegar | 0.5 tsp Cayenne | 0.5 tsp Ground Cloves | 1 tsp Black Pepper
instructions: Score ham in diamond pattern 1cm deep. | Mix peach preserves, brown sugar, mustard, vinegar, cayenne and spices. | Place ham in roasting tin. Brush 1/3 of glaze. | Bake at 160C for 90 min, glazing every 30 min. (90 min) | Rest 15 min. (15 min) | Slice and serve with remaining warm glaze.

name: Smoked Beef Ribs
description: Massive beef short ribs - smoked 6 hours until the meat pulls from the bone.
pro_tip: Enhance the final presentation with a high-quality finishing salt and pickled red onions to balance the richness.
ingredients: 2 kg Beef Short Ribs | 3 tbsp Coarse Salt | 3 tbsp Black Pepper | 2 tbsp Garlic Powder | 400 g Oak Wood Chips | 200 ml Beef Broth
instructions: Trim excess fat. Apply 50/50 salt and pepper rub generously. | Rest at room temp 1 hour. (60 min) | Smoke meat-side up at 110C for 6 hours. (360 min) | Spritz with beef broth every hour. (60 min) | When bark is dark and temp reads 98C, rest 1 hour in cooler. (60 min) | Slice between bones. Serve with pickles and white bread.

name: Grilled Skirt Steak
description: Chimichurri-marinated skirt steak grilled over high heat.
pro_tip: Temper the steak to room temperature before grilling to ensure even edge-to-edge doneness.
ingredients: 700 g Skirt Steak | 40 g Parsley | 10 g Oregano | 4 cloves Garlic | 60 ml Red Wine Vinegar | 100 ml Olive Oil | 2 whole Red Chilli | 2 tsp Salt | 1 tsp Cumin
instructions: Blend chimichurri: parsley, oregano, garlic, vinegar, oil, chilli, salt and cumin. | Marinate steak in half the chimichurri 30 min. (30 min) | Grill on highest heat 3 min per side for medium-rare. (6 min) | Rest 5 min. (5 min) | Slice thin across grain. Serve with remaining chimichurri.

name: Pit Boss Beans
description: Long-simmered pinto beans cooked under the brisket drippings.
pro_tip: Replace brown sugar with blackstrap molasses for mineral complexity and a darker, glossier finish.
ingredients: 500 g Pinto Beans | 200 g Smoked Brisket Fat Trimmings | 2 whole Onion | 6 cloves Garlic | 2 tbsp Chipotle in Adobo | 3 tbsp Tomato Puree | 3 tbsp Brown Sugar | 3 tbsp Apple Cider Vinegar | 1 tbsp Salt | 2 tsp Cumin
instructions: (This recipe is designed to cook under a brisket in a smoker, absorbing the drippings. Fat trimmings come from preparing a whole brisket — see Smoked Brisket in the BBQ catalog.) Soak beans overnight. (480 min) | Render brisket trimmings in a cast iron Dutch oven. (10 min) | Add onion and garlic. Cook 5 min. (5 min) | Add all remaining ingredients and beans. Cover with water. | Place under brisket in smoker for 3 hours at 135C, absorbing drippings. (180 min) | Season and serve alongside brisket.

name: Smoked Duck Legs
description: Duck legs slow-smoked with five spice and honey glaze.
pro_tip: Flash-sear or torch the skin post-smoke for essential textural contrast.
ingredients: 4 whole Duck Legs | 2 tsp Five Spice | 4 tbsp Honey | 3 tbsp Soy Sauce | 25 g Ginger | 4 cloves Garlic | 3 tbsp Rice Vinegar | 1 tsp Salt | 200 g Cherry Wood Chips
instructions: Score duck skin. Mix five spice and salt. Rub over duck. | Mix honey, soy, ginger, garlic and vinegar into glaze. | Smoke duck at 120C for 2.5 hours with cherry wood. (150 min) | Brush with glaze every 40 min. | Rest 10 min. (10 min) | Serve with steamed bok choy and jasmine rice.

name: Smoked Trout Dip
description: Flaked smoked trout blended with cream cheese, horseradish and dill.
pro_tip: Substitute crème fraîche for sour cream to achieve a luxurious, Michelin-standard mouthfeel.
ingredients: 300 g Smoked Trout | 200 g Cream Cheese | 80 g Sour Cream | 2 tbsp Horseradish | 20 g Dill | 2 whole Lemon | 2 tbsp Capers | 4 whole Spring Onion | 1 tsp Black Pepper
instructions: Flake trout, removing all bones. | Beat cream cheese and sour cream until smooth. | Fold in trout, horseradish, dill, lemon, capers and spring onion. | Season with black pepper. | Serve with crackers or cucumber slices.

name: Honey Mustard Glazed Pork Chops
description: Thick pork chops grilled and finished with honey mustard glaze.
pro_tip: Brine the chops for four hours in an apple-cider solution to ensure Michelin-level moisture and seasoning penetration.
ingredients: 4 whole Pork Chops | 3 tbsp Honey | 3 tbsp Dijon Mustard | 2 tbsp Whole Grain Mustard | 2 tbsp Apple Cider Vinegar | 2 tsp Garlic Powder | 3 sprigs Rosemary | 1 tsp Salt | 1 tsp Black Pepper
instructions: Season chops with garlic powder, salt and pepper. | Mix honey, both mustards and vinegar. | Grill chops on high heat 4 min per side. (8 min) | Move to indirect heat. Brush glaze over. Cook 5 more min. (5 min) | Rest 5 min. Brush remaining glaze. Serve with rosemary.

name: Smoked Queso Dip
description: Smoky melted cheese dip with canned tomatoes and jalapeños.
pro_tip: Incorporate fire-roasted poblanos instead of raw jalapeños to add depth and a sophisticated char.
ingredients: 500 g Processed Cheese | 400 g Canned Diced Tomatoes | 3 whole Jalapeños | 0.5 whole Onion | 2 cloves Garlic | 1 tsp Smoked Paprika | 1 tsp Cumin | 15 g Coriander | 200 g Tortilla Chips
instructions: Dice jalapeños, onion and garlic. | Cube cheese. Place in cast iron skillet. | Add tomatoes, jalapeños, onion, garlic, paprika and cumin. | Smoke at 175C for 25 min, stirring halfway. (25 min) | Top with coriander. Serve immediately with tortilla chips.

name: Smoked Lamb Shoulder
description: Slow-smoked lamb shoulder with harissa rub - pulled at the table.
pro_tip: Ensure the lamb reaches an internal temperature of 93C for an elite, melt-in-the-mouth texture.
ingredients: 2 kg Lamb Shoulder | 3 tbsp Harissa | 3 tbsp Olive Oil | 6 cloves Garlic | 2 tsp Cumin | 2 tsp Coriander | 4 sprigs Rosemary | 2 whole Lemon | 8 whole Flatbreads | 200 g Tzatziki
instructions: Score lamb deeply. Mix harissa, oil, garlic, cumin and coriander. | Push marinade into cuts. Rest overnight. (480 min) | Smoke at 120C for 6 hours with rosemary wood chips. (360 min) | Rest 30 min wrapped in foil. (30 min) | Pull apart at the table. Serve in flatbreads with tzatziki and lemon.
